concerns.text: T026-T027 attempt to validate core invariants (crossing number, braid index) against KnotInfo, but FR-003 and SC-008 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED from Knot Atlas (not computed) and algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. Task deliverable contradicts spec requirements - implementer cannot execute this task as specified.

T049 generates 'logs.md' documentation file but FR-007 requires actual timestamped log files capturing operation/input/output/parameters/status/duration_ms for reproducibility. Deliverable (documentation about logs) does not match requirement (actual log files). Implementer cannot execute this task as specified.

T054 covers checking 15+ reproducibility documents in a single task. Too coarse - downstream task_atomizer will split. Recommend splitting into per-document verification tasks for better granularity and parallel execution.

T062-T066 address reviewer concerns (dan-rockmore, marie-curie-simulated) but are not explicitly mandated in spec.md requirements. While executable, these may represent scope creep beyond authorized deliverables. Consider verifying with spec owner before implementation.
T043 (missing_invariant_flags in code/data/validator.py) is identical to T009. Duplicate task creates unnecessary work and potential conflict. Remove T043.
T008 (create base directory structure) overlaps with T001 (create project structure). T001 already specifies code/, data/, docs/, tests/ substructure. T008 is redundant - remove or merge with T001.
T026 and T027 both write to docs/reproducibility/algorithm_validation.md. These should be combined into a single task to avoid file conflict.
T032 and T033 both modify code/analysis/regression.py (model fitting and metrics computation). Should be combined into single task to avoid file conflict.
T040 and T041 both write to docs/reproducibility/hyperbolic_volume_validation.md. Should be combined into single task to avoid file conflict.
